name: webmotor
description: WebMotor - chạy 3 service cùng lúc (Backend + Admin + Client) bằng npm

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix BackEnd/server install && npm --prefix admin install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.db:seed: mysql -h localhost -u root -pduyvip123@ motor < docker/init/01-schema.sql && mysql -h localhost -u root -pduyvip123@ motor < docker/init/02-seed.sql && mysql -h localhost -u root -pduyvip123@ motor < docker/init/03-product-data.sql && mysql -h localhost -u root -pduyvip123@ motor < docker/init/04-touring.sql && mysql -h localhost -u root -pduyvip123@ motor < docker/init/05-adventure.sql && mysql -h localhost -u root -pduyvip123@ motor < docker/init/06-classic.sql && mysql -h localhost -u root -pduyvip123@ motor < docker/init/07-accessories.sql
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:setup && npm run db:seed
